# Let's open the provided file to read raw contents.
path = "/mnt/data/file-WJCoYEXjk3mAaYnkgXRhZd-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw_text = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
raw_text[:1000], len(raw_text)

import re, json, textwrap, itertools, unicodedata, sys, math
raw = raw_text

# Find all occurrences of text between straight double quotes
quote_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'"', raw)]
pairs = list(zip(quote_positions[::2], quote_positions[1::2]))
len(pairs), pairs[:5]

entries = []
for (qs, qe) in pairs:
    span = raw[qs+1:qe]
    context_before = raw[max(0, qs-80):qs]
    context_after = raw[qe: min(len(raw), qe+80)]
    entries.append((qs, qe, span, context_before, context_after))
for qs, qe, span, ctxb, ctxa in entries:
    print("quote:", qs, qe, "len", len(span))
    print("before:", ctxb)
    print("span:", span)
    print("after:", ctxa)
    print("----")

spans = []
for (qs, qe) in pairs:
    start = qs+1
    end = qe
    span_text = raw[start:end]
    # trim edges if needed
    # define characters to trim
    trim_chars = ''.join([' ', '\t', '\n', '\r', '"', '«', '»', "'", '(', ')', '[', ']', '{', '}', '<', '>', '،', '؛', ':', '.', ',', '!', '؟', '…', 'ـ'])
    # trim from left
    while start < end and raw[start] in trim_chars:
        start += 1
    # trim from right
    while end > start and raw[end-1] in trim_chars:
        end -= 1
    span_text = raw[start:end]
    # Determine classification by cues in context
    # We'll look 64 chars before start
    before = raw[max(0, start-64):start]
    after = raw[end:min(len(raw), end+64)]
    cue = None
    # Heuristic: if "قال الله تعالى" within before or after near by, classify as Aya
    # Or if "سورة" and a colon near implies verse reference; but both appear
    if "قال الله تعالى" in before or "وقال الله تعالى" in before or "القرآن الكريم" in before:
        cue = "Aya"
    # Hadith cues
    hadith_cues = ["عن النبي", "قال رسول الله", "النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم", "ﷺ", "في الحديث", "رواه البخاري", "رواه مسلم", "أخرجه", "حديث"]
    if any(c in before or c in after for c in hadith_cues):
        # if also aya cues, prefer hadith? But rule says classify by matn itself; but we can't test that now.
        # We'll just if hadith cues present and no aya cues
        if cue is None:
            cue = "Hadeeth"
    if cue is None:
        cue = "Aya"  # fallback, but we expect cues exist
    spans.append((start, end, span_text, cue))
    
spans
all(raw[s:e] == t for s,e,t,_ in spans), [(s,e,len(t), raw[s:e]==t) for s,e,t,_ in spans]

def context_has_cues(start, end):
    before = raw[max(0, start-64):start]
    after = raw[end:min(len(raw), end+64)]
    cues = {
        'Aya': ['قال الله تعالى', 'وقال الله تعالى', 'كما قال تعالى', 'الآية', 'سورة', 'القرآن', 'يقول الله', 'قال تعالى'],
        'Hadeeth': ['قال رسول الله', 'عن النبي', 'النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم', 'ﷺ', 'في الحديث', 'رواه', 'حديث', 'أخرجه']
    }
    return before, after, cues

for s, e, t, typ in spans:
    before = raw[max(0, s-64):s]
    after = raw[e:min(len(raw), e+64)]
    print(typ, "before:", before.replace("\n", "\\n"))
    print("after:", after.replace("\n","\\n"))
    print("---")

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":377,"span_end":481,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ اسْجُدُوا لِأَدَمَ فَسَجَدُوا إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَى وَكُنتُ بِهِ عَدوًّا","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":520,"span_end":630,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ اسْجُدُوا لِبَنِي آدَمَ فَسَجَدُوا إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَى وَكُنتُ لَهُ عَدُوًّا","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":667,"span_end":913,"span_text":"وَلَوْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَأَرْسَلَ مَلَائِكَةً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ فَيَنزِلُونَ عَلَيْهِ فَقُلْنَا خُذْ مِنْ كُلِّ جِنتٍ شَيْئًا كَأَنَّهُ يَرِدُ بِأَيْدِيكُمْ وَلَوْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَزادَهُمْ وَلَكِنَّهُ لِيُبَيِّنَ بِهِ بَعْضَ أَمْرِهِ إِلَى الْعِبَادِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":949,"span_end":1139,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ عَضْبَةً مِنَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ لَوْ يَفْتَرِيُ عَلَيْهَا بَعْضًا مِنَ الْقَوْلِ لَوَجَدُوا لَوْلَا أَنْ يَكُونَ اللَّهُ يَرَزَقُهُمْ لَفَتَحُوا عَلَيْهَا فَتْحًا عَظِيمًا","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1216,"span_end":1415,"span_text":"إِنَّ الشَيْطَانَ يُزَيِّنُ لِلسَّيِّئِ عَمَلَهُ فَيَظُنُّ أَنَّهُ يُصِيبُ مِنَ اللَّهِ مَنَفَعَةً وَإِنَّ الشَيْطَانَ لَيُزَيِّنُ لِلصَّابِرِ عَمَلَهُ فَيَظُنُّ أَنَّهُ يُصِيبُ مِنَ اللَّهِ مَضَرَةً","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1470,"span_end":1650,"span_text":"إِنَّ الشَيْطَانَ يَخُطُّ عَلَى رِجْلِ الرَجُلِ وَيُزَيِّنُ لَهُ الرِجالَ فَيَظُنُّ أَنَّهُمُ أَخَوانُهُ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُزَيِّنُ لِلرِجالِ الرِجالَ فَيَظُنُّ أَنَّهُمُ أَخَوانُهُ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
